Project.name: VisualArch_v2
Project.Description: AI-driven software architecture prototyping and code scavenger platform.

Layer.name: Backend

KeyComponents.Component: AI-orchestrated planning, coding, and critique pipeline.
Optimized O(N) broadcaster for real-time collaboration.
Atomic transactional system for AI usage meta-credits.

Layer.DataPersistence: MongoDB Atlas with Mongoose Schemas (History, ADRs, Comments, Workspaces).

Layer.name: Frontend
Layer.Stack: Next.js 14, React, Tailwind CSS, Puck UI

Features.Feature: Three-panel workspace for visual design, console, and documentation.
Component-driven UI prototyping that informs AI generation.

Layer.name: AI
Layer.Optimizations: Parallelized node generation, Exponential backoff for rate limits.
